arabicText: يَا لَطِيفُ يَا خَبِيرُ يَا حَلِيمُ أَلْطُفْ بِنَا فِي الْقَضَاءِ وَالْأَقْدَارِ
latinTransliteration: Yā Laṭīfu yā Khabīru yā Ḥalīmu-lṭuf binā fi-l-qaḍā'i wa-l-aqdār
englishTranslation: O Gentle, O All-Aware, O Forbearing, show us gentleness in divine decrees and destiny.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Lëf ki, Ku Teey ki, Ku Muñ ki, laabal sunuy dund ci say dogal.
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ لِࣺفْ كِ كُ تِيقْ كِ كُ مُنْ كِ لَابَلْ سُنُيْ دُنْدْ سِ سَيْ دُجَلْ

arabicText: يَا رَحْمَنُ يَا رَحِيمُ أَدْخِلْنَا فِي جَنَّةِ النَّعِيمِ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
latinTransliteration: Yā Raḥmānu yā Raḥīmu adkhilnā fī jannati-n-na‘īmi bighayri ḥisāb
englishTranslation: O Merciful, O Compassionate, admit us into the Gardens of Bliss without reckoning.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom yërmënde ju yaatu ja, dugal nu ci àjjana te bañ nu saytu.
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ يِࣺرْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ دُجَلْ نُ سِ اَجَّنَ تِ بَنْ نُ سَيْتُ

arabicText: يَا سَمِيعُ يَا بَصِيرُ يَا عَلِيمُ اسْتَجِبْ دُعَاءَنَا فِي كُلِّ آنٍ
latinTransliteration: Yā Samī‘u yā Baṣīru yā ‘Alīmu-stajib du‘ā'anā fī kulli ān
englishTranslation: O All-Hearing, O All-Seeing, O All-Knowing, answer our supplications at every moment.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Dégg ki, Ku Gis ki, Ku Xam ki, nanguil sunuy ñaan sa sùnek.
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ دِجْ كِ كُ جِسْ كِ كُ خَمْ كِ نَنْجُيْلْ سُنُيْ نْيَانْ سَ سُنِكْ

arabicText: يَا مَلِكُ يَا قُدُّوسُ يَا سَلَامُ طَهِّرْ نُفُوسَنَا مِنَ الْأَرْجَاسِ
latinTransliteration: Yā Maliku yā Quddūsu yā Salāmu ṭahhir nufūsanā minal-arjās
englishTranslation: O Sovereign, O Holy, O Giver of Peace, purify our souls from spiritual impurities.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Buur bi, Ku Sell ki, Ku Jamu ki, setal sunuy xol ci bépp lëndëm.
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُورْ بِ كُ سِلْ كِ كُ جَمُ كِ سِتَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ لِࣺنْدِࣺمْ

englishTranslation: O Sovereign, O Holy, O Giver of Peace, purify our souls from spiritual impurities. (Stanza 52)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Buur bi, Ku Sell ki, Ku Jamu ki, setal sunuy xol ci bépp lëndëm. (Wers 52)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُورْ بِ كُ سِلْ كِ كُ جَمُ كِ سِتَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ لِࣺنْدِࣺمْ [52]

arabicText: يَا لَطِيفُ يَا خَبِيرُ يَا حَلِيمُ أَلْطُفْ بِنَا فِي الْقَضَاءِ وَالْأَقْدَارِ [53]
latinTransliteration: Yā Laṭīfu yā Khabīru yā Ḥalīmu-lṭuf binā fi-l-qaḍā'i wa-l-aqdār (53)
englishTranslation: O Gentle, O All-Aware, O Forbearing, show us gentleness in divine decrees and destiny. (Stanza 53)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Lëf ki, Ku Teey ki, Ku Muñ ki, laabal sunuy dund ci say dogal. (Wers 53)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ لِࣺفْ كِ كُ تِيقْ كِ كُ مُنْ كِ لَابَلْ سُنُيْ دُنْدْ سِ سَيْ دُجَلْ [53]

arabicText: يَا رَحْمَنُ يَا رَحِيمُ أَدْخِلْنَا فِي جَنَّةِ النَّعِيمِ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ [54]
latinTransliteration: Yā Raḥmānu yā Raḥīmu adkhilnā fī jannati-n-na‘īmi bighayri ḥisāb (54)
englishTranslation: O Merciful, O Compassionate, admit us into the Gardens of Bliss without reckoning. (Stanza 54)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom yërmënde ju yaatu ja, dugal nu ci àjjana te bañ nu saytu. (Wers 54)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ يِࣺرْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ دُجَلْ نُ سِ اَجَّنَ تِ بَنْ نُ سَيْتُ [54]

arabicText: يَا سَمِيعُ يَا بَصِيرُ يَا عَلِيمُ اسْتَجِبْ دُعَاءَنَا فِي كُلِّ آنٍ [55]

latinTransliteration: Yā Samī‘u yā Baṣīru yā ‘Alīmu-stajib du‘ā'anā fī kulli ān (103)
englishTranslation: O All-Hearing, O All-Seeing, O All-Knowing, answer our supplications at every moment. (Stanza 103)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Dégg ki, Ku Gis ki, Ku Xam ki, nanguil sunuy ñaan sa sùnek. (Wers 103)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ دِجْ كِ كُ جِسْ كِ كُ خَمْ كِ نَنْجُيْلْ سُنُيْ نْيَانْ سَ سُنِكْ [103]

arabicText: يَا مَلِكُ يَا قُدُّوسُ يَا سَلَامُ طَهِّرْ نُفُوسَنَا مِنَ الْأَرْجَاسِ [104]
latinTransliteration: Yā Maliku yā Quddūsu yā Salāmu ṭahhir nufūsanā minal-arjās (104)
englishTranslation: O Sovereign, O Holy, O Giver of Peace, purify our souls from spiritual impurities. (Stanza 104)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Buur bi, Ku Sell ki, Ku Jamu ki, setal sunuy xol ci bépp lëndëm. (Wers 104)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُورْ بِ كُ سِلْ كِ كُ جَمُ كِ سِتَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ لِࣺنْدِࣺمْ [104]

arabicText: يَا لَطِيفُ يَا خَبِيرُ يَا حَلِيمُ أَلْطُفْ بِنَا فِي الْقَضَاءِ وَالْأَقْدَارِ [105]
latinTransliteration: Yā Laṭīfu yā Khabīru yā Ḥalīmu-lṭuf binā fi-l-qaḍā'i wa-l-aqdār (105)
englishTranslation: O Gentle, O All-Aware, O Forbearing, show us gentleness in divine decrees and destiny. (Stanza 105)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Lëf ki, Ku Teey ki, Ku Muñ ki, laabal sunuy dund ci say dogal. (Wers 105)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ لِࣺفْ كِ كُ تِيقْ كِ كُ مُنْ كِ لَابَلْ سُنُيْ دُنْدْ سِ سَيْ دُجَلْ [105]
